reflection.candidate_lesson: A rate-divergence SHORT that fires while HTF market structure is BULLISH and no CHOCH/BOS confirms the trade direction is a counter-structure macro bet that loses even with a valid FVG and liquidity sweep.
reflection.mechanism: Institutional order flow does not reverse on a single BSL sweep — when HTF structure is still bullish, the sweep is a stop-run inside continuation, not a distribution top. A macro rate-diff z of only -0.97 (sub-1.0 magnitude) lacks the conviction to overpower an intact bullish delivery, so the short is entered into the very liquidity institutions are using to continue upward. Structure must confirm (BOS/CHOCH in trade direction) before macro direction can be trusted.
reflection.testable_rule: if signal_direction != htf_structure_direction and not structure_shift_confirmed and abs(rate_diff_z) < 1.2: veto_trade()

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
